title: coleosanthus diffusus
intro: Coleosanthus diffusus, also known as Coleus diffusus, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Coleosanthus diffusus include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. In herbal preparations, Coleosanthus diffusus is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and poultices that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
